title: hoya blashernaezii subsp. blashernaezii
intro: Hoya blashernaezii subsp. blashernaezii, also known as the Blashernaez's Hoya or Hoya blashernaezii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to the Philippines. It is a climbing plant with fragrant, star-shaped flowers and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and cold. The plant is known to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which provide various health benefits such as relief from respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin irritations. Hoya blashernaezii subsp. blashernaezii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to extract its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
